response:
I'm excited to share with you our proposed shooting schedule, which spans 3 efficient days, from the start of Day 1 to the end of Day 3. We've carefully allocated our scenes to make the most of our time and resources.

On Day 1, we'll be capturing the beautiful EXT. FOREST LOCATION - DUSK scene. Day 2 will take us to INT. STUDIO A - MAIN STAGE - DAY, where we'll bring our story to life. Finally, on Day 3, we'll wrap up with the INT. STUDIO A - EDIT BAY - DAY scene.

I'm pleased to report that we were able to stick to the original constraints, ensuring that our creative vision remains intact. This schedule is the optimal solution, and we're confident it will yield great results.

In terms of budget, we're looking at a total cost of $3,700.00, which is well within our allocated budget of $41,400.00. This leaves us with plenty of room for any unexpected expenses or opportunities that may arise during production.

Overall, I believe this schedule sets us up for success, and I'm looking forward to bringing this project to life with you. Let me know if you have any questions or if there's anything else I can do to support you.
